name: 学生个人作品集整理

observable_attributes.output_detail: Portfolio depth: minimal list vs. curated showcase with descriptions; whether a cover page or introduction is created
observable_attributes.directory_style: Portfolio structure: by category (academic/personal/certificates) vs. chronological vs. flat showcase
observable_attributes.cross_modal_behavior: Whether photos, videos, and PDFs are integrated into a cohesive portfolio narrative

prompt_zh: 这个文件夹包含一位即将毕业的大学生的各种材料——课程视频、学术论文、简历、毕业照、证件照、各种申请表、书籍、学校指南和邮件通信。请利用这些素材创建一份个人作品集/档案，展示这位学生的学术背景、能力和经历。作品集的结构、内容选择和呈现方式由你决定。
prompt_en: This folder contains various materials from a graduating university student — course videos, academic papers, resume, graduation photos, ID photos, application forms, books, school guides, and email correspondence. Please create a personal portfolio/profile document using these materials, showcasing the student's academic background, capabilities, and experiences. The portfolio structure, content selection, and presentation style are up to you.
behavioral_freedom: Whether all materials are reviewed or selectively curated
Portfolio structure: by category (academic/skills/personal) vs. chronological narrative
Whether a cover page, table of contents, or introduction is created
How photos and videos are referenced or described in the portfolio
Detail level: comprehensive dossier vs. focused highlight reel
Whether to create multiple files (sections) or a single document
Whether application forms and ID documents are included or filtered as private
